_comment: Canonical UserSettings document shape. VSOD is the authority — it creates and updates this document in the user_settings collection. VSE reads it at request time to resolve per-user LLM configuration. Document ID is the user_id.
_consumers: VSE (Python — reads at request time to build per-user Settings)

user_settings._description: Per-user settings document. Stored in the 'user_settings' collection with ID '{user_id}'.

llm_provider.description: LLM provider for this user. Overrides platform_settings provider when set.

openai_endpoint.description: OpenAI-compatible API base URL. Overrides platform_settings openai_endpoint when set.

ollama_endpoint.description: Ollama API base URL. Overrides platform_settings ollama_endpoint when set.

anthropic_endpoint.description: Anthropic API base URL. Overrides platform_settings anthropic_endpoint when set.

openai_api_key.description: OpenAI API key. Overrides platform_settings openai_api_key when set.

ollama_api_key.description: Ollama API key. Overrides platform_settings ollama_api_key when set.

gemini_api_key.description: Gemini API key. Overrides platform_settings gemini_api_key when set.

anthropic_api_key.description: Anthropic API key. Overrides platform_settings anthropic_api_key when set.

llm_temperature.description: LLM sampling temperature. Overrides platform_settings llm_temperature when set.

llm_max_tokens.description: Maximum tokens per LLM response. Overrides platform_settings llm_max_tokens when set.

llm_command_gen_temp.description: Sampling temperature for command generation tribunal.

llm_command_gen_enabled.description: Whether command generation (Tribunal) is enabled. Overrides platform_settings llm_command_gen_enabled when set.

llm_command_gen_verifier.description: Whether command generation verifier pass is enabled. Overrides platform_settings llm_command_gen_verifier when set.

llm_command_gen_passes.description: Number of Tribunal passes for command generation. Overrides platform_settings llm_command_gen_passes when set.

vertex_search_enabled.description: Whether Vertex AI Search is enabled for this user.
